remember: Recall the S.I units of work, energy and power.
State the relationship between work done and kinetic energy.
List the different forms of energy and their conversion.
understand: Explain the concept of work and energy using diagrams.
Describe the law of conservation of energy.
Explain the difference between potential and kinetic energy.
apply: Calculate work done by a variable force.
Find the change in energy of a particle using energy transfer equations.
Use the concept of power to solve problems related to work and energy.
analyze: Compare and contrast different types of energy and their conversions.
Explain the efficiency of a machine in terms of work and energy.
Use the concept of energy to solve problems related to motion and force.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To describe the concept of work done by a variable force.
As per NCERT objective 2: To explain the law of conservation of energy.
board_exam_objectives: The work-energy theorem and its application to find the change in kinetic energy of an object.
The concept of potential energy and its different forms (e.g., gravitational potential energy, elastic potential energy).
The relationship between work done and energy transfer.
